posts.author: DrewB (Drew Billups)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Currently only the Main Table view can be reported to dashboards. The Main Table view is editable by all members who have access to it, and cannot default sorts saved.

What are you trying to achieve

The Dashboard should be able to support specific views being mapped to it which can be curated for high level reporting.
